nodes.name: Spizocorys
nodes.summary: Spizocorys（Spizocorys）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如斯氏沙百灵、花脸沙百灵、粉嘴沙百灵等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: 博氏沙百灵
nodes.summary: 博氏沙百灵（学名：Spizocorys fringillaris），是百灵科沙百灵属的一种，为南非的特有种。全球活动范围约为42,900平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为濒危。 博氏沙百灵的平均体重约为19.2克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的高海拔草原和牧草地。 参考文献 Spizocorys fringillaris. BirdLife.org. [2011-06-27]. （原始内容存档于2016-03-04）.
nodes.shortSummary: 博氏沙百灵（学名：Spizocorys fringillaris），是百灵科沙百灵属的一种，为南非的特有种。全球活动范围约为42,900平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为濒危。 博氏沙百灵的平均体重约为19.2克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的高海拔草原和牧草地。

nodes.name: 滩涂
nodes.summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It typically inhabits short upland grasslands at elevations between 1,500 and 1,900 meters above sea level, preferring flat or gently sloping plateaus and hilltops with short, dense, and well-grazed natural grass

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It typically inhabits short upland grasslands at elevations between 1,500 and 1,900 meters above sea level, preferring flat or gently sloping plateaus and hilltops with short, dense, and well-grazed natural grass

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Botha's lark has lost the bulk of its original habitat, but the species can thrive on farmland if managed correctly, with for example the right cattle grazing regimes. This species faces a range of threats, with habitat loss, degradation, and fragmentation being the most significant. Agricultural expansion—particularly cropland development and unfavourable pasture management—continues to transform and reduce the extent of suitable high-altitude grasslands
